title: Using Blob Object as a Pixel Counter
description:
Using Blob Object as a Pixel Counter

Using Blob Object as a Pixel Counter

The Blob object can be used as a pixel counter.
  A pixel counter counts all of the pixels in an image that fall within the blob thresholds.

Follow these steps:

			Create a Blob object.
			Set desired polarity.
			Set High and Low thresholds.
			Set NumberToFind to 0. This will cause the Blob object to find all blobs in the image.
			Set MinArea to 1 and MaxArea to 999999. Blobs of one pixel or more will be counted.
			Run the sequence.

Use the TotalArea result to read the total number of pixels that fall within the blob thresholds.
